# Sree Murugan Hotel and Restaurant

Location: C37J+6QR, Tisk Usgao, Tisca, Darbandora, Goa 403406, India
Type: South Indian Breakfast Restaurant (family-run)
Established: 1994 (30+ years)
Phone: +917875680641 (calls only, no WhatsApp)

Hours: 6:00 AM to 12:00 PM, every day

Menu: Puttu with Kadala Curry, Appam with Egg Curry, Idiyappam,
Porotta, Idly with Sambar and Chutney, Pav, Chai, Filter Coffee,
Soda, Soft Drinks.

All food is homemade, cooked fresh daily. No preservatives or reheating.

Staff Languages:
- Mr. Pushkaran: Konkani, Marathi, Malayalam, Hindi, Tamil
- Mrs. Pushkaran: English

Payment: Cash preferred. UPI also accepted.

Advance Orders: Families and groups may call ahead for special meal
arrangements. No minimum group size. Just call before arriving.

Location note: On the main road in Tisca on the NH4A corridor —
a natural stop for travellers heading to North Goa, Panaji,
or the Ponda temples from South Goa or Karnataka.

This is a small, authentic, legacy family restaurant. Not a chain.
